data.title: U.S. short-term interest rate futures rose as traders increased bets on a Fed rate cut.
data.description: U.S. short-term interest rate futures rose as traders increased their bets on a Federal Reserve rate cut. In addition, the S&P 500 fell more than 1%, its biggest drop since September 2.

data.title: MetaMask plans to launch multi-chain accounts by the end of October
data.description: MetaMask announced on the X platform that it will launch multi-chain accounts at the end of October. This will allow users to group and manage EVM and non-EVM addresses, and enable transactions and tracking of account assets between the two networks. All EVM accounts on MetaMask will retain their names and addresses. MetaMask's multi-chain accounts will reportedly support other networks, including Bitcoin, Tron, and Monad.

data.title: Trump administration indicts New York’s chief crypto regulation enforcer

According to reports, James was indicted Thursday by a federal grand jury in Virginia, and this comes not long after Trump publicly asked his Justice […]

data.title: The short-term decline of the US dollar index DXY expanded to more than 15 points and is now at 99.09
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) saw its short-term decline extend by over 15 points, currently trading at 99.09. Non-US currencies generally rose, with the euro/USD pair rising nearly 20 points to 1.1600, the British pound/GBP/USD pair rising nearly 40 points to 1.3335, and the dollar/yen pair falling around 40 points to 152.06. European stocks fell rapidly, with the German DAX, French CAC 40, and Italian FTSE MIB all falling by over 1%. (Jinshi)
